findings.evidence: `rg -n "min_characteristicFaceExponent_eq_zero|@\[simp\]" code/TauCeti/LowDimTopology/Plumbing` shows the new theorem at line 127 has no attribute, while existing normal forms such as `characteristicLowerFaceExponent_natCast` and `characteristicUpperFaceExponent_natCast` are marked `@[simp]` in `CubeFace.lean`.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` to `min_characteristicFaceExponent_eq_zero`; if `grind` is expected to discharge the same bookkeeping, also add the appropriate `@[grind]` annotation.
findings.issue: `min_characteristicFaceExponent_eq_zero` is the characteristic normal-form lemma for the new face-exponent API, but it has no `@[simp]` annotation, so goals containing the two face exponents do not simplify to the promised vanishing fact automatically.

summary: The new public API exposes the intended recursion, but the face-exponent vanishing lemma is not registered for automation even though it is the normal form downstream users need.
